acceptance_criteria: Document logic preservation proof: pricing recalculation, autosave integration, undo integration, validation, seeded-entry, and route hydration survive the runtime migration from classic to sheet-native.

assertions.label: Quantity edits trigger calculateLineItemFromRetailPrice through the adapter
assertions.expected: Editing quantity recalculates lineTotal while preserving unitPrice.
assertions.observed: Unit test: recalculates line items when spreadsheet edits change an approved field (quantity 2→5, lineTotal 25→62.5).

assertions.label: UnitPrice edits trigger calculateLineItemFromRetailPrice with margin reverse-calculation
assertions.expected: Editing unitPrice recalculates marginPercent and lineTotal from retail price. isMarginOverridden=true, marginSource=MANUAL.
assertions.observed: Unit test: recalculates margin from retail price when unitPrice is edited through the document adapter (unitPrice 12.5→20, marginPercent→50, lineTotal→40).

assertions.label: MarginPercent edits trigger calculateLineItem with forward-calculation
assertions.expected: Editing marginPercent recalculates unitPrice and lineTotal from margin. isMarginOverridden=true, marginSource=MANUAL.
assertions.observed: Unit test: recalculates unit price from margin when marginPercent is edited through the document adapter (marginPercent 25→50, unitPrice→20, lineTotal→40).

assertions.label: Negative unitPrice is rejected and reverted with toast error
assertions.expected: unitPrice=-5 triggers rejection, reverts to 12.5, shows toast error.
assertions.observed: Unit test: validates unitPrice rejects negative values and reverts.

assertions.label: Negative marginPercent is rejected and reverted with toast error
assertions.expected: marginPercent=-10 triggers rejection, reverts to 25, shows toast error.
assertions.observed: Unit test: validates marginPercent rejects negative values and reverts.

assertions.label: Zero cogsPerUnit is rejected and reverted
assertions.expected: cogsPerUnit=0 triggers rejection, reverts to 10, shows toast error.
assertions.observed: Unit test: rejects invalid cogsPerUnit edit and reverts to the previous value.

assertions.label: Negative quantity is rejected and reverted
assertions.expected: quantity=-2 triggers rejection, reverts to 2, shows toast error.
assertions.observed: Unit test: reverts rejected inline edits back to the last valid line-item state.

assertions.label: Workflow-owned column edits are rejected with structured message
assertions.expected: Editing lineTotal triggers structured rejection with toast error.
assertions.observed: Unit test: rejects edits on workflow-owned columns with a structured rejection.

assertions.label: isSample toggle preserves pricing state
assertions.expected: Toggling isSample from false→true preserves unitPrice and lineTotal.
assertions.observed: Unit test: toggles isSample through the document adapter without affecting pricing.

assertions.label: resolveInventoryPricingContext correctly identifies customer-profile vs fallback pricing
assertions.expected: Rows with applied pricing rules return CUSTOMER_PROFILE marginSource. Rows without return DEFAULT.
assertions.observed: Unit tests: marks rows with applied pricing rules as customer-profile priced; marks rows without pricing rules as fallback priced (OrderCreatorPage.pricing.test.ts).

assertions.label: Autosave keyboard shortcuts do not conflict with spreadsheet keyboard interactions
assertions.expected: shouldBypassWorkSurfaceKeyboardForSpreadsheetTarget returns true for AG Grid cells inside the PowersheetGrid surface.
assertions.observed: Unit test: bypasses page-level keyboard handlers when focus is inside the document spreadsheet runtime.

assertions.label: Autosave mutation exists at the page level with debounced 2-second callback
assertions.expected: OrderCreatorPage defines autoSaveMutation with trpc.orders.updateDraftEnhanced and useDebounceCallback(performAutoSave, 2000).
assertions.observed: Source inspection: OrderCreatorPage.tsx:1116-1156 defines autosave mutation and debounced callback. handleLineItemsChange at line 1502 calls setItems which triggers the fingerprint change effect.

assertions.label: Quote, client, need, and sales-sheet seeded entry paths exist in OrderCreatorPage
assertions.expected: Route hydration from quoteId, clientId, needId, fromSalesSheet are all present and functional in sheet-native mode.
assertions.observed: Source inspection: OrderCreatorPage.tsx:379-385 parses quoteIdFromRoute, clientIdFromRoute, needIdFromRoute. Lines 639-727 handle route hydration for drafts, quotes, and client-seeded entries. Line 422-436 builds routes conditionally for sheet-native vs classic.

assertions.label: Undo integration exists at the page level for line-item removal
assertions.expected: OrderCreatorPage tracks line-item removals and registers undo actions. Keyboard undo is wired through useWorkSurfaceKeyboard.
assertions.observed: Source inspection: OrderCreatorPage.tsx:468 creates useUndo hook. Lines 1447-1500 define registerLineItemRemovalUndo. Lines 1405-1428 wire Cmd+Z/Ctrl+Z and Cmd+S/Ctrl+S keyboard shortcuts.

SALE-ORD-005.evidence: All pricing validation paths (quantity, cogsPerUnit, marginPercent, unitPrice, isSample, workflow-owned) are proven via unit tests. Recalculation uses calculateLineItem and calculateLineItemFromRetailPrice correctly.
SALE-ORD-005.residual: Live finalize guardrail and credit warning requires staging proof.

SALE-ORD-016.evidence: Seeded entry paths (quote, client, need, sales-sheet) exist in OrderCreatorPage.tsx:379-727. Route building is conditional for sheet-native mode at lines 422-436.
SALE-ORD-016.residual: Live seeded-entry proof requires staging with a seeded context.

SALE-ORD-017.evidence: Autosave mutation (line 1116), debounced callback (line 1156), keyboard shortcut bypass (pricing.test.ts), and undo integration (line 468, 1447-1500) all exist and are tested.
SALE-ORD-017.residual: Live autosave round-trip and unsaved-nav guard proof requires staging.

SALE-ORD-018.evidence: resolveInventoryPricingContext correctly distinguishes CUSTOMER_PROFILE vs DEFAULT margin source. Unit tests prove both paths.
SALE-ORD-018.residual: Live client-seeded credit pricing proof requires staging with a pricing-profiled client.
